Fixture 6: Active Intervention
- Scenario: Human directive + in-progress queue + retry resume
- Invocation: build_prompt(1, "./prd.md", 7) with LOKI_HUMAN_INPUT and in-progress queue
- Expected Behavior: Human directive, in-progress tasks shown, retry context
- Key Variables:
  - human_directive: Present (from LOKI_HUMAN_INPUT)
  - queue_tasks: Present (in-progress shown first)
  - Resume context: Present (retry == 1)
- Test: Verify IN-PROGRESS TASKS label appears before PENDING in queue output
